examples_cut_or_rewrite.question: What is the MMU website page title for Intelligent Robotics?
examples_cut_or_rewrite.answer: Adapt and Innovate, Enrol in a Robotics Course in Malaysia | MMU

examples_cut_or_rewrite.question: What does the MMU Intelligent Robotics page meta description say?
examples_cut_or_rewrite.answer: Explore robotics in Malaysia with MMU's Bachelor of Science in Intelligent Robotics. Gain hands-on experience in multi-disciplinary programme. See the requirements here.

examples_cut_or_rewrite.question: When was the MMU Intelligent Robotics page last modified?

examples_cut_or_rewrite.question: What top quick links are shown on the MMU Intelligent Robotics page?
examples_cut_or_rewrite.answer: The page header shows these quick links: APPLY NOW: https://www.mmu.edu.my/apply-now/; INTAKE INFO: https://www.mmu.edu.my/intake_enquiry/; SCHOLARSHIP: https://www.mmu.edu.my/financial-assistance/.

examples_cut_or_rewrite.question: What support links are shown on the MMU Intelligent Robotics page?
examples_cut_or_rewrite.answer: The page shows these support links: VIRTUAL TOUR: https://streetview.my/multimediauniversity/; WHATSAPP: https://wa.me/60383125959?text=Hello%20Multimedia%20University!.

examples_cut_or_rewrite.question: What is entry requirement 1 for Intelligent Robotics?
examples_cut_or_rewrite.answer: Pass Foundation or Matriculation studies in a related field from a recognised institution with a minimum CGPA of 2.00.

examples_cut_or_rewrite.question: What is entry requirement 2 for Intelligent Robotics?
examples_cut_or_rewrite.answer: Pass STPM or equivalent with a minimum Grade C (GP 2.00) in any 2 subjects.

examples_cut_or_rewrite.question: What is entry requirement 3 for Intelligent Robotics?
examples_cut_or_rewrite.answer: Pass A-Level with a minimum Grade D in any two subjects.

examples_cut_or_rewrite.question: What is entry requirement 4 for Intelligent Robotics?
examples_cut_or_rewrite.answer: Pass UEC with a minimum Grade B in at least five subjects.

examples_cut_or_rewrite.question: What is entry requirement 5 for Intelligent Robotics?
examples_cut_or_rewrite.answer: Pass STAM with minimum grade of Jayyid.

examples_cut_or_rewrite.question: What is entry requirement 6 for Intelligent Robotics?
examples_cut_or_rewrite.answer: Recognised Diploma in a related field with a minimum CGPA of 2.00 or equivalent.

examples_cut_or_rewrite.question: What is entry requirement 7 for Intelligent Robotics?
examples_cut_or_rewrite.answer: Pass DKM, DLKM or DVM with a minimum CGPA of 2.50; candidates below 2.50 must have at least two years of related work experience.

examples_cut_or_rewrite.question: What is entry requirement 8 for Intelligent Robotics?
examples_cut_or_rewrite.answer: Other relevant and equivalent qualifications recognised by the Malaysian Government.

examples_cut_or_rewrite.question: What is entry requirement 9 for Intelligent Robotics?
examples_cut_or_rewrite.answer: Possess an APEL.A certificate from MQA for admission into Bachelor programmes.

examples_cut_or_rewrite.question: What is the page title for this programme?
examples_cut_or_rewrite.answer: Adapt and Innovate, Enrol in a Robotics Course in Malaysia | MMU

examples_review.question: Which faculty offers the Intelligent Robotics programme?
examples_review.answer: The Intelligent Robotics programme is offered by Faculty of Artificial Intelligence and Engineering (FAIE).

examples_review.question: What action links are provided on the MMU Intelligent Robotics page?
examples_review.answer: The page provides these action links: ENQUIRE NOW: https://www.mmu.edu.my/programmes-by-faculty-all/programmes-by-faculty-faie/bachelor-of-science-hons-in-intelligent-robotics/mmu2018/enquire-now/; HOW TO APPLY: https://www.mmu.edu.my/programmes-by-faculty-all/programmes-by-faculty-faie/bachelor-of-science-hons-in-intelligent-robotics/mmu2018/how-to-apply/; DOWNLOAD BROCHURE: https://www.mmu.edu.my/wp-content/uploads/2026/05/2026-MMU_FOE-FAIE-FET-FCI-FIST-14-05-2026-small.pdf; DOWNLOAD PROGRAMME FEES: https://www.mmu.edu.my/wp-content/uploads/2023/07/UG_Fee-Structure_update_150725_MQA.pdf.

examples_review.question: What APEL.A link does the MMU Intelligent Robotics page provide?
examples_review.answer: The page points APEL.A applicants to https://www.mmu.edu.my/apel-a/.

examples_review.question: What sections are shown on the MMU Intelligent Robotics page?
examples_review.answer: The scraped page sections include: Entry Requirements, Programme Structure, Core, Year 1, Year 2, Year 3, BYOC Elective Subjects, University Subjects, Career Prospects.

examples_review.question: What note applies to DKM, DLKM or DVM applicants for Intelligent Robotics?
examples_review.answer: DKM / DLKM / DVM candidates may be required to undergo a Bridging Programme as an additional requirement.

examples_review.question: How many credit hours is ARM6113?
examples_review.answer: ARM6113 Technical Calculus carries 3 credit hour(s).

examples_review.answer: ARE6113 Basic Electronics carries 3 credit hour(s).

examples_review.question: How is ARE6113 Basic Electronics assessed?
examples_review.answer: Lab: 10%; Assignment: 15%; Test/Quiz: 15%; Final Examination: 60%.
